ASBESTOS LAW AND MOTION 503, DEFENDANT HONEYWELL INTERNATIONAL INC., F/K/A ALLIEDSIGNAL, INC., SUCCESSOR-IN-INTEREST TO THE BENDIX CORPORATION'S MOTION TO DISMISS FOR FAILURE TO PROSECUTE CLAIM - DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO DISMISS FOR FAILURE TO PROSECUTE PURSUANT TO C.C.P. 583.310, 583.360 IS GRANTED IN PART AND DENIED IN PART. THE MOTION IS GRANTED AS TO PLAINTIFF PAUL PEDRETTI, JR. DEFENDANT PROPERLY SERVED PAUL PEDRETTI, JR. WITH THE MOTION AND NO OPPOSITION WAS FILED. THE MOTION IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO PLAINTIFF PETER PEDRETTI. PETER REMAINS A PLAINTIFF WITH BRAYTON PURCELL AS HIS COUNSEL OF RECORD HOWEVER DEFENDANT'S PROOF OF SERVICE FAILED TO DEMONSTRATE IT PROVIDED PETER, THROUGH HIS COUNSEL, NOTICE OF ITS MOTION. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: TERI L. JACKSON, MATTER NOT REPORTED

ASBESTOS LAW AND MOTION 503, DEFENDANT FORD MOTOR COMPANY'S MOTION TO DISMISS AS TO PLAINTIFF PAUL PEDRETTI, JR. FOR FAILURE TO PROSECUTE PURSUANT TO C.C.P. 583.310, 583.360 IS GRANTED. DEFENDANT PROPERLY SERVED PAUL PEDRETTI, JR. WITH THE MOTION AND NO OPPOSITION WAS FILED. THE COURT MAKES IT CLEAR THAT ITS RULING IS ONLY AS TO PLAINTIFF PAUL PEDRETTI, JR. PETER PEDRETTI REMAINS A PLAINTIFF WITH BRAYTON PURCELL AS HIS COUNSEL OF RECORD. HOWEVER DEFENDANT'S NOTICE OF MOTION EXPLICITLY ONLY SOUGHT FOR ITS MOTION TO BE GRANTED AS TO PAUL PEDRETTI, JR., AND THE COURT CANNOT GRANT DIFFERENT RELIEF THAN THAT STATED IN THE NOTICE OF MOTION. EVEN IF THE COURT COULD CONSIDER THE MOTION AS TO PETER PEDRETTI, DEFENDANT'S MOTION WOULD BE DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE FOR FAILURE TO DEMONSTRATE IT PROVIDED PETER, THROUGH HIS COUNSEL, NOTICE OF ITS MOTION. THE PREVAILING PARTY IS TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER THAT CONFORMS WITH THE COURT'S TENTATIVE RULING. JUDGE: TERI L. JACKSON, MATTER NOT REPORTED.

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss Plaintiff Peter Pedretti For Failure To Prosecute Claim
Off Calendar Feb-18-2016 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance and tentative ruling adopted: Defendant Honeywell International, Inc.'s motion to dismiss plaintiff Peter Pedretti for failure to prosecute is off calendar as moot. A dismissal as to Peter Pedretti was filed February 4, 2016. Judge: Garrett L. Wong, Matter not reported (503/GLW)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss Plaintiff Peter Pedretti For Failure To Prosecute Claim; Proof Of Service
Off Calendar Feb-18-2016 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance and tentative ruling adopted: Defendant Ford Motor Company's joinder to Honeywell International, Inc.'s motion to dismiss plaintiff Peter Pedretti for failure to prosecute is off calendar as moot. A dismissal as to Peter Pedretti was filed February 4, 2016. Judge: Garrett L. Wong, Matter not reported (503/GLW)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss For Failure To Prosecute Claim
Off Calendar Dec-15-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Daniel D. O'Shea of PERKINS COIE (310-788-9900), appearing for defendant / moving party Honeywell International Inc., F/K/A Alliedsignal Inc., Successor-In-Interest to The Bendix Corporation

RULING:
DEFENDANT HONEYWELL INTERNATIONAL INC., F/K/A ALLIEDSIGNAL, INC., SUCCESSOR-IN-INTEREST TO THE BENDIX CORPORATION'S MOTION TO DISMISS FOR FAILURE TO PROSECUTE CLAIM

No other appearance and tentative ruling adopted: Defendant Honeywell International Inc.'s motion to dismiss for failure to prosecute pursuant to C.C.P. 583.310, 583.360 is granted in part and denied in part. The motion is granted as to plaintiff Paul Pedretti, Jr. Defendant properly served Paul Pedretti, Jr. with the motion and no opposition was filed. The motion is denied without prejudice as to plaintiff Peter Pedretti. Peter remains a plaintiff with Brayton Purcell as his counsel of record however defendant's proof of service failed to demonstrate it provided Peter, through his counsel, notice of its motion. Order signed in open court. Judge: Teri L. Jackson, Matter not reported (503/TLJ)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss Action For Delay In Prosecution
Off Calendar Nov-12-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance and tentative ruling adopted: Defendant Ford Motor Company's motion to dismiss as to plaintiff Paul Pedretti, Jr. for failure to prosecute pursuant to C.C.P. 583.310, 583.360 is granted. Defendant properly served Paul Pedretti, Jr. with the motion and no opposition was filed. The Court makes it clear that its ruling is only as to plaintiff Paul Pedretti, Jr. Peter Pedretti remains a plaintiff with Brayton Purcell as his counsel of record. However defendant's notice of motion explicitly only sought for its motion to be granted as to Paul Pedretti, Jr., and the Court cannot grant different relief than that stated in the notice of motion. Even if the Court could consider the motion as to Peter Pedretti, defendant's motion would be denied without prejudice for failure to demonstrate it provided Peter, through his counsel, notice of its motion. The prevailing party is to prepare a form of order that conforms with the Court's tentative ruling. Judge: Teri L. Jackson, Matter not reported. (503/TLJ)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss Action For Delay In Prosecution
Off Calendar Nov-10-2015 Continued To Nov-12-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 503
MINI MINUTES:
Defendant Ford Motor Company's motion to dismiss for failure to prosecute is continued on the court's own motion to November 12, 2015. Judge: Teri L. Jackson, Matter not reported (503/TLJ)

Defendant Dana Companies, Llcs Notice Of Motion To Dismiss For Failure To Prosecute
Off Calendar May-12-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Alston Lew of HUGO PARKER (415-808-0300), appearing for defendant / moving party Dana Companies, LLC

RULING:
DEFENDANT DANA COMPANIES, LLC'S MOTION TO DISMISS FOR FAILURE TO PROSECUTE

No other appearance and tentative ruling adopted: Defendant Dana Companies, LLC's motion to dismiss for failure to prosecute pursuant to C.C.P. 583.310, 583.360 is granted. From a review of the Register of Actions, the two remaining plaintiffs are Peter Pedretti and Paul Pedretti, Jr. As the Court sees no order relieving Brayton Purcell as counsel for him, Peter appears to still be represented by counsel and thus was given proper notice of this motion when it was e-served. Paul, representing himself, was given proper notice via mail service. No oppositions were filed. Order signed in open court. Judge: Teri L. Jackson, Matter not reported (503/TLJ)

Defendant S.T.M. Automotive, Inc.S Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss For Lack Of Prosecution [C.C.P. §§ 583.310 And 583.360]
Off Calendar Feb-03-2015 Text Ruling
